meta.name: ASSIST Alcohol, Smoking and Substance Involvement Screening Test
meta.fullName: WHO Alcohol, Smoking and Substance Involvement Screening Test V3.1
meta.description: The ASSIST is a multi-substance screening tool developed by the WHO. It assesses risk across 10 substance categories, with independent scoring for each substance to identify low, moderate, and high risk levels.
meta.author: WHO ASSIST Working Group (2010)
meta.reference: WHO ASSIST Working Group. Alcohol, Smoking and Substance Involvement Screening Test (ASSIST). Geneva: WHO; 2010.
meta.instruction: Please answer the following questions based on your experience over the past three months. Each group of questions addresses one substance category. If you have never used a substance, select 'Never' or 'No, never'.

questions.text: In the past three months, how often have you used Tobacco Products (cigarettes, cigars, pipe, e-cigarettes, etc.)?
In the past three months, how often have you had a strong desire or urge to use Tobacco Products (cigarettes, cigars, pipe, e-cigarettes, etc.)?
During the past three months, how often has your use of Tobacco Products (cigarettes, cigars, pipe, e-cigarettes, etc.) led to health, social, legal, or financial problems?
During the past three months, how often have you failed to do what was normally expected of you because of your use of Tobacco Products (cigarettes, cigars, pipe, e-cigarettes, etc.)?
Has a friend or relative or anyone else ever expressed concern about your use of Tobacco Products (cigarettes, cigars, pipe, e-cigarettes, etc.)?

choices.label: Yes, but not in the past 3 months

questions.text: Have you ever tried and failed to control, cut down or stop using Tobacco Products (cigarettes, cigars, pipe, e-cigarettes, etc.)?

choices.label: Yes, but not in the past 3 months

questions.text: In the past three months, how often have you used Alcoholic Beverages (beer, wine, spirits, etc.)?
In the past three months, how often have you had a strong desire or urge to use Alcoholic Beverages (beer, wine, spirits, etc.)?
During the past three months, how often has your use of Alcoholic Beverages (beer, wine, spirits, etc.) led to health, social, legal, or financial problems?

Has a friend or relative or anyone else ever expressed concern about your use of Alcoholic Beverages (beer, wine, spirits, etc.)?

questions.text: Have you ever tried and failed to control, cut down or stop using Alcoholic Beverages (beer, wine, spirits, etc.)?

choices.label: Yes, but not in the past 3 months

ranges.label: Low Risk
ranges.description: Overall substance use risk is low.

ranges.label: Moderate Risk
suggestions: Learn about health effects of substance use

ranges.label: High Risk
ranges.description: High substance use risk, possible dependence.
suggestions: Consult a doctor or mental health professional

tobacco.label: Low Risk
tobacco.description: Your Tobacco Products use is at a low risk level.

tobacco.label: Moderate Risk
tobacco.description: Your Tobacco Products use poses moderate risk. Consider reducing or stopping use.

tobacco.label: High Risk
tobacco.description: Your Tobacco Products use is at a high risk level. Professional help is strongly recommended.

alcohol.description: Your alcohol use is at a low risk level.

alcohol.label: Moderate Risk
alcohol.description: Your alcohol use poses moderate risk. Consider reducing your intake.

alcohol.label: High Risk
alcohol.description: Your alcohol use is at a high risk level. Professional help is strongly recommended.
